falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4,800 on any single day in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The 79% pattern match to bottom_2024_aug is invalidated because the August 2024 bottom held at higher levels; a break below 4,800 would confirm this is not a similar bottoming structure but rather a breakdown into a deeper correction, proving the HOLD signal was wrong

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The BLOWOFF SCORE of 39 suggests controlled fear near a capitulation threshold; sustained VIX above 35 indicates panic is escalating beyond the measured blowoff pattern, invalidating the 'controlled bottoming' thesis and proving the pattern match was a false positive

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops below 3.80% while S&P 500 simultaneously trades below its 50-day moving average
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This combination signals a flight-to-safety recession scare rather than a growth-scare bottom; the August 2024 bottom occurred with yields stable/rising as stocks stabilized, so this divergence would prove the current macro regime is fundamentally different and the verdict is wrong

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
